meaning: n.上现蜃景(光通过低层大气发生异常折射形成的一种海市蜃楼)
examples: As lives are affected by any number of looming challenges—climate crisis, automation in the workplace—humans are going to need creative thinking more than ever.
He found that strongty-lateralised individuals were able to feed twice as fast as wealdy-lateralised ones when there was a threat of a predator looming above them.
And one of the most important of those is the looming Social Security crisis.
But the market might not be fully recognizing another looming problem, Mr. Petzel says.
